title: ClientSide Commands
description: Adds a bunch of useful client side commands to your game. For players and developers.
body:
ClientSide Commands

Adds a bunch of useful non-cheat clientside commands to your game such as - QOL features - settings commands - f3 menu display on keyboard layout with no f3 key - debugging commands for developers ## 🔎 Full list of commands
List of commands
  • /calc ... : calculate an expression
  • /copy mypos/myrot/myUUID : copy values to the clipboard
  • /emoji ... : send an emoji in the chat (such as ¯\(ツ)/¯ or (⊙ _ ⊙ ) )
  • /lookat ... ... : rotate your camera to the specified yaw and pitch
  • /mynetherpos convert your coordinates to the nether (/8 if the player is not already in the nether)
  • /myoverworldpos convert your coordinates to the overworld (*8 if the player is not already in the overworld)
  • /clearchat : clear the chat
  • /wiki : open the wiki's page of the held item
  • /rc : reload chunks
  • /rr : reload ressourcepacks
  • /ss : takes a screenshot
  • /quit : quit the world/server and go back to the main menu
  • /set fov ... : set a fov value (allow for values outside of the expected range)
  • /set gamma ... : set a gamma value (allow for values outside of the expected range)
  • /set hudscale ... : scale the hud
  • /toggle fog : toggle in-game fog
  • /toggle advancedtooltips : toggle advanced item tooltips
  • /toggle f3menu (/f3) : toggle the f3 menu, useful for keyboards without the f3 key
  • /toggle debugrenderer ... : toggle one of the debug renderers, not accessible from inside of the vanilla game
  • All the /copy command arguments also exists as standalone command to display the value
## 📦 Modpack Feel free to add this mod in your modpacks.
